meta.title: SourceBox Sentry Landing Hero
meta.usage_context: website landing page hero — right-side visual, replacing CameraGridPreview mockup

subject.name: Quiet home study at dusk — private security camera setup

physical_properties.scene_type: domestic study / home office, warm wood surfaces, golden-hour evening light

foreground.notes: compact black USB webcam clipped onto the top edge of a desktop monitor with a tiny green LED indicator dot visible. NO logos, NO branding text on the camera. Slightly out of focus to emphasize depth.

midground.notes: modern computer monitor on a wooden desk. Screen shows a dark security dashboard with a 2x2 grid of small camera feed thumbnails. Dashboard uses green (#22c55e) and subtle purple (#a855f7) accent colors on a near-black background (#0a0a0f). The dashboard glow casts a soft green tint onto the desk surface. NO readable text on screen — just suggested dashboard shapes and colored accents.
small green leafy plant in a matte ceramic pot, soft organic shape, adds warmth
matte ceramic mug, warm earth color, with subtle steam — communicates end-of-day calm

background.notes: large window with warm golden-hour light streaming through. Soft, diffused, acts as natural rim light on the monitor edge. Sky beyond shows a subtle dusk gradient (deep teal fading to warm orange).
tall wooden bookshelf with books and decorative objects, blurred via shallow depth of field. NO readable text on book spines.

surface.notes: warm walnut/oak desk with visible grain texture

background.color: deep teal-blacks transitioning to warm amber from the window

atmosphere.mood: private, calm, end-of-day, home, safe, premium, quietly technical

camera.notes: 3/4 angle from slightly above and to the left of the desk, looking across the scene toward the window. Monitor + camera in sharpest focus; foreground and bookshelf fall off into bokeh.

lighting.notes: Primary: warm golden window light from back-right, creating a soft rim on the monitor edge and webcam. Secondary: subtle green tint from the dashboard screen casting onto the desk and nearby objects, creating a brand-aligned color spill. No harsh shadows. Overall exposure on the moody/dim side — like a high-end product photograph at dusk.

controls.notes: Photorealistic, cinematic, premium product-photography aesthetic. Aspect ratio 4:3. Should evoke 'your space, your stack, your data' without being too on-the-nose.
